prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京大学医学部在浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约327名、407名、410名、331名、446名，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字增大），近两年波动幅度加大，2025年基准位次约446名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021年13人、2022年14人、2023年14人、2024年15人、2025年17人，呈逐年小幅扩招态势；2026年计划为20人，较2025年增加3人，扩招幅度约17.6%，有利于降低竞争烈度。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部隶属于北京大学，985、211、双一流高校，软科主榜北京大学位列全国第2名（2026年），医学学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期内北京大学声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园安全、录取断档等事件，但医学部作为独立招生单元受影响较小；抖音热度排名第3（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度持续高位；依托北京大学学科体系，临床医学A、口腔医学A、基础医学A、药学A+、护理学A+、公共卫生与预防医学A等，医学类学科评估顶尖，对考生有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等专业热度持续高热推荐，医学类专业社会需求旺盛；浙江省2026年高考考生总数约40万人，较2025年29.1万人大幅增加约37.6%，竞争基数显著扩大；省控线（普通类一段）近五年在488–497分间窄幅波动，2025年为490分，整体稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次446名、2026年扩招约17.6%、浙江省考生总数大幅增加约37.6%导致竞争加剧、医学类专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在498名左右，较2025年略有后移（位次数字增大），波动区间438–558名。扩招对位次有下拉作用，但考生规模激增和医学热度高位形成上推合力，最终位次小幅后移。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 口腔医学（八年制本博连读）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）
- 口腔医学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 基础医学（八年制本博连读）
- 临床医学（五年制）
- 药学（六年制本硕连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 预防医学（七年制本硕连读）
- 英语（医学英语）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间438–558名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向（临床医学五年制、药学本硕连读），一档专业（口腔本博、临床本博）作为冲刺，三档专业（预防医学本硕、医学英语）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<438名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Peking University Health Science Center in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category were approximately 327, 407, 410, 331, and 446 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (increasing ranking numbers), with greater fluctuations in the last two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 446. The enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Zhejiang was 13 in 2021, 14 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 17 in 2025, showing a gradual small-scale expansion; the 2026 plan is 20, an increase of 3 from 2025, an expansion rate of about 17.6%, which helps reduce competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is affiliated with Peking University, a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, Peking University ranks 2nd nationally (2026), with top-tier medical disciplines nationwide, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Peking University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety and admission gaps, but the Health Science Center, as an independent enrollment unit, is less affected. It ranks 3rd in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms and sustained high attention for applications. Relying on Peking University's discipline system, it has A-level Clinical Medicine, A-level Stomatology, A-level Basic Medicine, A+ Pharmacy, A+ Nursing, A+ Public Health and Preventive Medicine, etc., with top evaluations in medical disciplines, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be highly recommended, with strong social demand for medical majors. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam candidates in Zhejiang Province is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.6% from 291,000 in 2025, greatly expanding the competition base. The provincial control line (general first segment) has fluctuated narrowly between 488 and 497 points in the past five years, with 2025 at 490 points, remaining stable overall.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 446, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 17.6%, the significant increase in Zhejiang's candidate total by about 37.6% leading to intensified competition, and the sustained high popularity of medical majors, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is around 498, slightly lower than 2025 (ranking number increases), with a fluctuation range of 438 to 558. The expansion has a downward effect on rankings, but the surge in candidate numbers and high medical popularity create an upward force, resulting in a slight ranking decline.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Stomatology (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Continuous Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Continuous Program)
- Stomatology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Basic Medicine (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Continuous Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Pharmacy (Six-Year Bachelor-Master Continuous Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Preventive Medicine (Seven-Year Bachelor-Master Continuous Program)
- English (Medical English).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 438 to 558, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction (Clinical Medicine Five-Year Program, Pharmacy Bachelor-Master Continuous Program), with Tier 1 majors (Stomatology Bachelor-Doctor, Clinical Medicine Bachelor-Doctor) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Preventive Medicine Bachelor-Master, Medical English) as safe backups. Rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<438) can focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors.
